en: You saw what? A hound. Out there in the hollow. A gigantic hound. Um. Look, Sherlock. We have to be rational.
ko: 뭐라고 봤다고? 사냥개. 저기 빈 곳에. 거대한 사냥개. 음. 들어봐, 셜록. 이건 이성적으로 접근해야 해.

en: About this. Okay. Now you. Of all people. Can't just. Let's just stick to what we know. Yes?
ko: 이 문제에 대해. 알겠어. 이제 너. 너 같은 사람이. 그냥. 우리가 아는 것에 집중하자. 알겠지?

en: Stick to the facts. Once you've ruled out the impossible, whatever remains of it. You can't just. You can't just. You can't just. You can't just. You can't just.
ko: 사실에 집중해. 불가능한 것을 배제한 후 남은 것. 그냥. 그냥. 그냥. 그냥. 그냥.

en: You can't just. You can't just. You can't just. You can't just. You can't just. You can't just. You can't just.
ko: 그냥. 그냥. 그냥. 그냥. 그냥. 그냥. 그냥.

en: You can't just. I said once you've ruled out the impossible, whatever remains, however improbable, must be true?
ko: 그냥. 불가능한 것을 배제한 후 남은 것, 아무리 불확실해도, 진실이어야 한다고 했지?

en: To force myself on... Feelings. But look, you see?
The body's betraying me. Interesting, yes? Emotions. Grit on the lips.
ko: 내 몸이 나를 배신하고 있어. 흥미롭지? 감정. 입술의 거친 감촉.
